title: Delete dead bin/ and scripts/ files
description: Delete: bin/stdio-server.js (2.2MB build artifact), bin/mcp-stdio.js (replaced by .cjs), bin/test-stdio.js (unreferenced). Delete scripts: scripts/fix-env.js (9 lines), scripts/optimize-dist.js (53 lines), scripts/release.sh (hardcoded 1.2.1, used locally only — not by CI), scripts/deploy-github-pages.sh (now done by CI), scripts/integration-test.ts and scripts/benchmark.ts (unreferenced). Also delete start.sh (uses invalid --cold-start-caching flag) and stdio-start.sh (hardcoded personal path).
validation: Each file removed. Verify no script references them via `grep -r 'integration-test.ts\|optimize-dist\|stdio-server.js\|fix-env.js' .` (excluding .git).
